sigWerErrors.reason: 'thẻ tạm' means 'temporary card', while 'hệ tạm' does not make sense in this context and changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'thời gian hiện tại' means 'current time', while 'thời gian đi lại' means 'commuting time', which changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
